scenes.text: The professor says group project and your stomach drops.
scenes.image_prompt: College classroom, professor writing GROUP PROJECT on whiteboard, one student's face dropping in the background, fluorescent lighting, cinematic

scenes.text: Four names on the slide. One person doing everything.
scenes.image_prompt: Laptop screen showing a Google Slides presentation with four names listed, late night dorm room, only one person typing while others' profile icons are idle, blue screen glow, cinematic

scenes.text: You send the first message in the group chat. Hey, when should we meet? Silence.
scenes.image_prompt: Phone screen showing a group chat with one sent message and no replies, read receipts showing everyone saw it, late afternoon, cinematic close-up

scenes.text: The night before it's due, someone sends their part. Two paragraphs. Wrong topic.
scenes.image_prompt: Student at desk at 2am, laptop open, holding head in hands, looking at a document with only two short paragraphs, exhaustion and frustration, cinematic warm lamp lighting

scenes.text: And somehow, you still get it done. Because you always do.
scenes.image_prompt: Student submitting assignment on laptop at sunrise, coffee cups scattered, triumphant but exhausted expression, morning golden light through window, cinematic
